docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON MAY-21-2026 BY ZOOM GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT SIDDAIYA, SHIVAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PHILLIP HILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHIVAM SIDDAIYA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, PHILLIP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIDDAIYA, SHIVAM SEE ATTACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY HILL, PHILLIP AS TO DEFENDANT SIDDAIYA, SHIVAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, PHILLIP ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PHILLIP HILL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHIVAM SIDDAIYA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
